form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resumes off a 57 day letup. Resuming 5th of 12 at Eagle Farm Mdn on February 4 over 1400m, 4 len behind Hermione Prancer with 57kg at $31. Second-up second last of 10 at Eagle Farm Mdn-Sw on February 18 over 1400m, slow going 6 len behind Tam Na Ghar with 55.5kg at $51. Has been racing in town and is worth following up.
